query:
SELECT 'timeline_events' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM timeline_events WHERE is_public = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'actors', COUNT(*) FROM actors WHERE is_public = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'documents', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE is_public = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stories', COUNT(*) FROM stories WHERE is_public = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'public_records_requests', COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'documents_with_file', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE is_public = 1 AND file_key IS NOT NULL AND file_key != '';
